issue_title: fix tree api being called twice on initial load due to uninitialized context being used
issue_body_preview:
## Description

During profiling, I found that /tree was still being called twice on initial load of error analysis component, hurting performance - specifically for large data.  This was due to context being used incorrectly in the constructor.  For more information, please see:
https://github.c
test_description_zh: 打开包含 Error Analysis 组件的页面，使用浏览器开发者工具的网络面板监控初始加载时对 /tree API 的调用情况。
expected_result_zh: Error Analysis 组件初始加载时，/tree API 只被调用一次，不应出现重复请求，页面加载性能正常。
